core: Full Stack Development, Cloud Deployments, CI/CD, Infrastructure Automation
frontend: React.js, Next.js, Zustand, Redux Toolkit, Module Federation (Rspack), React Hook Form, Zod, MUI
backend: Node.js (Express), Bun (Elysia), Go (Gin), REST APIs, WebSockets, MQTT, Microservices
devops: Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, CloudBees CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Terraform, HashiCorp Vault, SonarQube
cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, ECR, CloudFront, IAM, Auto Scaling), GCP (GKE)
databases: PostgreSQL (Drizzle ORM, Indexing, Read Replicas, Query Optimization), MongoDB, Redis
tools: Git, Biome, Husky, Linux, Jira, Agile/Scrum
